p1_compose_plugin.cmd: docker compose version || apt-get install -y docker-compose-plugin
p1_compose_plugin.err:
docker: unknown command: docker compose

Run 'docker --help' for more information

p1_neo4j_up.cmd: cd /root/companion && docker compose pull neo4j && docker compose up -d neo4j && echo 'Waiting 55s...' && sleep 55
p1_neo4j_up.fix: cd /root/companion && docker compose restart neo4j && sleep 55

p1_verify_redis.fix: cd /root/companion && docker compose restart redis && sleep 5

p2_systemd.cmd:
cat > /etc/systemd/system/companion-api.service << 'SEOF'
[Unit]
Description=Companion Intelligence API
After=network.target
[Service]
Type=simple
User=root
WorkingDirectory=/root/companion
Environment=PYTHONPATH=/root/companion/agent:/root/companion/agent/modes:/root/companion/agent/memory:/root/companion/agent/tools
ExecStart=/root/companion/venv/bin/uvicorn agent.api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
SEOF
systemctl daemon-reload && systemctl enable companion-api && systemctl start companion-api && sleep 4 && echo ok
p2_systemd.fix: systemctl restart companion-api && sleep 6 && systemctl is-active companion-api
